Container.Name: ygege
Container.Overview: Ygege - high-performance public YGG indexer relay for Prowlarr and Jackett.
Container.Description:
Ygege exposes a local HTTP relay used by Prowlarr or Jackett custom definitions for ygg.gratis / YGG.
PROWLARR SETUP: 1. Install this container and keep the container name as "ygege". 2. In Prowlarr, find the AppData path from System > Status. 3. Copy the upstream ygege.yml definition to: {Prowlarr AppData}/Definitions/Custom/ygege.yml You may need to create the Custom folder. 4. Restart Prowlarr. 5. Add the "ygege" indexer from the normal Prowlarr indexer flow.
NETWORKING: This template defaults to the wg0 Docker network. The upstream definition includes http://localhost:8715/ and http://ygege:8715/ by default. If Prowlarr is not on the same Docker network as this container, add your Unraid server URL to the links section of ygege.yml, for example: - http://192.168.1.10:8715/
Official Prowlarr definition: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/djerayane/ygege/develop/ygege.yml

Config.Name: Web/API Port
Config.Description: Port used by Prowlarr or Jackett to reach the ygege relay.

Config.Name: Bind IP
Config.Description: Address the ygege service listens on inside the container. Keep 0.0.0.0 for Docker/Unraid access.

Config.Name: Bind Port
Config.Description: Port the ygege service listens on inside the container. Keep this aligned with the container port mapping.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Log verbosity. Common values: debug, info, warn, error.
